metadata.title: ProductPic AI
metadata.description: Generate store-ready product images with preset styles, reference uploads, and channel-specific crops.

page.title: ProductPic AI
page.description: Create polished product visuals for marketplaces, Shopify stores, and social commerce campaigns.

generator.title: Product Image Studio
generator.subtitle: Describe the product, choose a commercial direction, and generate a store-ready visual.

form.product_placeholder: e.g. collagen peptide powder, wireless earbuds, handmade scented candle
form.description_placeholder: Materials, size, packaging, color, texture, category, or anything that should stay accurate.
form.selling_points_placeholder: e.g. travel size, premium aluminum, fragrance notes, gift-ready packaging
form.audience_placeholder: e.g. busy professionals, Gen Z skincare shoppers, home coffee enthusiasts
form.references_placeholder: Drag images here or choose files from your device
form.references_limit: JPG, PNG, WebP, or GIF · Up to 14 images · 10MB each
form.references_error: Some images failed to upload. Remove them and try again.

marketplace-clean.title: Marketplace Clean
marketplace-clean.description: Sharp catalog lighting and clear product detail.

luxury-editorial.title: Luxury Editorial
luxury-editorial.description: Premium campaign mood with refined negative space.

dtc-minimal.title: DTC Minimal
dtc-minimal.description: Modern brand look with soft shadows and restraint.

natural-organic.title: Natural Organic
natural-organic.description: Warm daylight, tactile props, and trustworthy freshness.

tech-premium.title: Tech Premium
tech-premium.description: Sleek reflections and precise studio control.

pure-white.title: Pure White
pure-white.description: Clean listing background with subtle contact shadow.

soft-gradient.title: Soft Gradient
soft-gradient.description: Neutral studio depth for polished brand imagery.

stone-marble.title: Stone Marble
stone-marble.description: Premium countertop texture and natural reflections.

home-lifestyle.title: Home Lifestyle
home-lifestyle.description: Realistic home setting with the product staged naturally.

urban-neon.title: Urban Neon
urban-neon.description: Modern color accents and cinematic contrast.

holiday-campaign.title: Holiday Campaign
holiday-campaign.description: Seasonal giftable scene with restrained props.

outdoor-sun.title: Outdoor Sun
outdoor-sun.description: Bright lifestyle light and aspirational atmosphere.

center-hero.title: Center Hero
center-hero.description: Full product visible with balanced margins.

three-quarter.title: Three Quarter
three-quarter.description: Depth, perspective, and believable contact shadows.

flat-lay.title: Flat Lay
flat-lay.description: Organized top-down layout with supporting props.

bundle-scene.title: Bundle Scene
bundle-scene.description: Primary product plus packaging or companion items.

instagram.title: Instagram
instagram.description: Lifestyle crop for paid social and feeds.

errors.timeout: Generation timed out. Please try again.
errors.insufficient_credits: Insufficient credits. Please top up to keep creating.

preview.title: Preview
preview.subtitle: Generated assets appear here as soon as they are ready.
preview.empty_hint: Enter a product, pick the commercial direction, and start generation.
